name: Josh Durey
description: Applied AI enablement. I audit workflows for AI readiness, build agentic systems, and run the LLM quality control that gets teams to adoption they can trust.
heroHeadline: I get AI working inside the teams that adopt it: the workflows worth automating, the agentic systems that run them, and the quality control that keeps the output trustworthy.
thesis: Most AI pilots stall in the same spot. The demo works, then nobody can say whether the output holds up or whether the workflow was worth automating at all. I close that gap end to end. I find the work worth handing to AI, build the system that does it, and QC the result until a team can put it in front of real users. The instinct for where things break before anyone notices comes from fifteen years measuring learning when the stakes were real.
